title: Configure default Python package repositories for Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow (Public Preview)
body:
Workspace admins can now configure private or authenticated package repositories within workspaces as the default pip configuration for Spark Declarative Pipelines on Lakeflow. This allows users in the workspace to install packages from internal Python repositories without explicitly defining `index-url` or `extra-index-url` values.

See [Configure default Python package repositories](/aws/en/admin/workspace-settings/default-python-packages) for more details.
